List of things impossible: flowers, funeral, goodbye message. Because speaking destroys all.
Close-up stickman dot eyes. Grief held in silence. Weight of never speaking.
Bitcoin symbols everywhere: portfolios, legislation, dinner tables. Ubiquitous.
People arguing about Bitcoin at dinner. None read whitepaper. Using invention without knowing creator.
Government buildings with Bitcoin legislation signs. Laws about the thing. Not about the person.

Stickman hands around coffee mug. Not correcting anyone. Being nobody.
Mirror of opening: same cafe, same laptop, same coffee. Price higher. Always higher.
Faceless stranger leaning over. Where is Satoshi? Stickman taking sip. No answer.
Bold text: 'The price of creating digital gold is that you can never claim it as yours.'
